notes: Two-leg NZDUSD/GBPJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar (OOS net Sharpe 0.60 vs 0.8), but it is the strongest remaining unbuilt pair with both positive DEV and OOS Sharpe after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723 baskets.

Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. NZDUSD.DWX and GBPJPY.DWX are the traded legs; GBPUSD.DWX and USDJPY.DWX are declared only as custom-symbol conversion history for USD-denominated GBPJPY accounting.

Repair note 2026-07-02: Q04 retries failed with NO_HISTORY/INCOMPLETE_RUNS/incomplete-fold classes while the manifest history scope only listed traded legs. The EA already selects and warms GBPUSD.DWX plus USDJPY.DWX in Strategy_EnsureBasketScope(); the manifest now declares the same conversion history.
